identity.name: Granny Ash
identity.story: Swept the famous hearth before the famous girl. Kept the other slipper. Tells nobody which foot.

relationships.kind: they trade lock recommendations and reveal nothing
sweeps under his tree at first light and has stopped asking where the extra apples come from
lets him guess in plain sight and has never once nodded

behavior.label: Granny Ash's slipper, kept and never which foot

child.label: sweeping under his tree, and asking nothing

children.label: sweeping her way toward the old apple tree
catching him at the hedge, apples still in hand, and sweeping on without asking

child.label: sweeping the square clean of fair-dust, slipper back where it belongs
